data.title: Dubai Insurance customers can now pay in crypto
data.description:
Dubai Insurance, a UAE insurance company, has introduced a crypto wallet developed by Zodia Custody to secure transparent receipt of premiums and payment of insurance claims in crypto. This is the first time an insurance company in the country allows policyholders to transact using digital and crypto assets. The secure, highly governed, and transparent solution, […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/dubai-insurance-customers-can-pay-in-crypto/

data.title: XRP spot ETFs see inflows again after record $53m outflow, price remains under pressure
data.description:
XRP spot ETFs have begun recording inflows again after a $53. 32 million net outflow on 20 January, though XRP’s price remains below key moving averages.
source: https://ambcrypto.com/xrp-spot-etfs-see-inflows-again-after-record-53m-outflow-price-remains-under-pressure/

data.title: Crypto News: Gold and Silver Social Media Interest Surged as Retail Drifted from Crypto
data.description:
Key Insights: Gold and silver dominated online market discussion through most of January as retail traders chased sharp price rallies. Social data from Santiment showed precious metals consistently outpacing crypto mentions across major platforms. The shift coincided with new price highs in both metals and fading momentum across digital assets
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2026/01/28/crypto-news-gold-and-silver-social-media-interest-surged-as-retail-drifted-from-crypto/

data.title: HSBC: Coinbase's opposition will not hinder the progress of the US crypto market structure bill.
data.description: In a report, HSBC stated that Coinbase's recent withdrawal of its support for the U.S. Crypto Markets Structure Act (CLARITY Act) will not derail the legislative process. The report notes that while Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong prefers "no bill is better than a bad bill," he is likely to accept a reasonable compromise. HSBC analysts Daragh Maher and Nishu Singla believe that establishing a legislative baseline is crucial for the stability needed for institutional entry into the market.

data.title: SEC and CFTC Chairmen to Discuss Cryptocurrency Regulation Coordination
data.description: SEC Chairman Paul Atkins has announced a scheduled meeting with CFTC Chairman Michael Selig on January 29. According to NS3.AI, the meeting will focus on enhancing regulatory coordination within the cryptocurrency sector. The discussion aims to address jurisdictional overlaps and establish a unified regulatory framework. This initiative is part of efforts to bolster the United States' status as a leading global hub for digital assets.

data.title: The SEC Chairman and the CFTC Chairman will discuss regulatory coordination in the crypto era on January 29.
data.description: SEC Chairman Paul Atkins announced on the X platform that he will be visiting the CFTC at 2 PM on January 29th to discuss regulatory harmonization in the crypto era with CFTC Chairman Michael Selig. Atkins stated that he looks forward to collaboration between the two agencies in this endeavor. According to previous reports, the event, themed "Harmonization in the Crypto Era and U.S. Financial Leadership," aims to discuss eliminating jurisdictional barriers between agencies and establishing a more unified regulatory framework for digital assets to support the U.S.'s goal of becoming a global crypto hub.

data.title: S&P 500 Index Experiences Intraday Decline
data.description: The S&P 500 index experienced a downturn during trading hours. According to ChainCatcher, the index fell from its high, dropping over 7,000 points to reach 6,978 points.

data.title: Paolo Ardoino explains why he chose Switzerland nuclear bunkers as storage locations for Tether’s gold
data.description:
Paolo Ardoino didn’t pick some shiny downtown vault to store billions in gold. He picked a nuclear bunker buried deep in the Swiss Alps. Built during the Cold War, it was designed to survive a nuclear blast. Now it’s full of gold bars owned by Tether, hauled in every single week, one to two tons […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/paolo-swiss-nuclear-bunkers-tether-gold/

data.title: Ethereum Targets Censorship Resistance With FOCIL in Hegotá Upgrade
data.description:
Ethereum researchers have proposed Fork-Choice Enforced Inclusion Lists (FOCIL), formally documented as EIP-7805, as the core censorship-resistance mechanism for the upcoming Hegotá network upgrade. The proposal is currently positioned as a flagship feature for Hegotá, which is expected to land in the second half of 2026, following the Glamsterdam hard fork scheduled for mid-2026.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/ethereum-targets-censorship-resistance-with-focil-in-hegota-upgrade/

data.title: The Protocol: Ethereum to roll out new AI agents standard soon
data.description:
The Protocol has announced that Ethereum is set to launch a new set of AI agents standards in the near future, aiming to enhance the integration of artificial intelligence within its network. This upcoming initiative is expected to streamline the development and deployment of AI applications, promoting better interoperability and efficiency across various platforms. As a result, developers and users alike will benefit from improved functionality and capabilities in leveraging AI technology within the Ethereum ecosystem.
source: https://www.coindesk.com/tech/2026/01/28/the-protocol-ethereum-to-roll-out-new-ai-agents-standard-soon
